channel.title: Sichuan-Cuisine on zhouyang — The 25th Frame
channel.description: Recent content in Sichuan-Cuisine on zhouyang — The 25th Frame

item.title: Laziji: The Dish Where You Hunt for Chicken in a Mountain of Chilies
item.description: The plate lands on your table and you laugh. You can’t help it. It’s a joke and a threat and an invitation all at once: a small mountain of dried red chilies, piled so high the chicken pieces underneath are just a conspiracy theory. The smell arrives separately, almost late: hot oil, toasted cumin, the back-of-throat prickle of Sichuan peppercorns volatilizing in the air above the wok. A few whole star anise are in there. Ginger slices the size of guitar picks. The oil still crackles.
